relationships: kab:Ad yexdem aya Tom deg yiḍ-a
kab:Ad as-tini d acu ara yexdem
kab:Ur d-cliɛeɣ ara deg wacu i yexdem Tom
kab:Ur yewɛiṛ ara ad yexdem yiwen aya
kab:Ur as-d-yehwi ara ad yexdem ass-a﹖
kab:Ur yessefk ara Sami ad yexdem akka
kab:Tom yella iḥemmel ad yexdem d Mary
kab:Ur ibeqqu ara Tom ad yexdem aya
kab:Ur yebɣi ara Tom ad yexdem ayen i Mary
kab:Iban Tom ue yettuɣal ara ad yexdem ayagiseg wass-a d asawen
kab:Tewɛed iman-is dakken ad yexdem ayenni
kab:Ulac ccek dakken ad as-tini ad yexdem aya
kab:Tom yenna-d, ur yezmir ara akk ad yexdem ayagi
kab:Ur gziɣ ara amek ur yezmir ara Tom ad yexdem ayagi
kab:Ur cukkeɣ ara ilaq ad yexdem aya i yiman-is
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad amneɣ d akken Tom yexdem ayen-nni
kab:Ulac ccek dakken ad as-yini ad yexdem aya
kab:Yezmer lḥal ad yili Tom yesɛa ayen nniḍen ara yexdem
kab:Ur tezmiremt ara ad as-tinimt i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Ulac ccek dakken ad as-tɛemmed ad yexdem aya
kab:Yessefk ɣef Tom ad yexdem ayagi anda nniḍen
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad as-tiniḍ i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Ur tezmirem ara ad as-tinim i Tom d acu ara yexdem
